title: Raccoon Removal in Dobbs Ferry, NY | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Dobbs Ferry, Westchester. Safe, humane wildlife control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with raccoons in your Dobbs Ferry home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides professional, humane raccoon removal services throughout Dobbs Ferry and Westchester County. Our experienced wildlife control specialists safely remove raccoons from attics, chimneys, crawl spaces, and other areas while preventing future intrusions.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Westchester communities like Dobbs Ferry, we understand the unique wildlife challenges facing riverside properties and historic homes in the area. Our licensed technicians use safe, humane methods and provide comprehensive exclusion services to ensure raccoons don't return.
localContext: Dobbs Ferry's tree-lined streets, proximity to the Hudson River, and mix of Victorian homes and waterfront properties create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. From the historic downtown near the waterfront to residential neighborhoods like Springhurst and areas near Mercy College, we've helped countless Dobbs Ferry residents reclaim their homes from these persistent wildlife intruders.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Dobbs Ferry?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Dobbs Ferry typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points, and necessary repairs. Simple removals start around $900, while complex cases involving multiple animals, extensive attic damage, or significant exclusion work can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Dobbs Ferry, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Dobbs Ferry due to the village's proximity to the Hudson River, abundant trees, and mix of older homes with accessible attics and chimneys. Raccoons are attracted to garbage, pet food, and shelter opportunities in attics and crawl spaces, making residential areas throughout Dobbs Ferry prime habitat for these adaptable animals.

faqs.question: How do you humanely remove raccoons from my Dobbs Ferry property?
faqs.answer: We use humane, proven methods including live trapping, one-way exclusion doors, and hands-on removal when appropriate. Our process involves thorough inspection, safe removal of all raccoons (including babies during breeding season), cleaning and sanitizing affected areas, and sealing all entry points to prevent re-entry. All methods comply with New York State wildlife regulations.

faqs.question: Can raccoons cause damage to my Dobbs Ferry home?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can cause significant damage including torn insulation, chewed wiring (fire hazard), damaged roof vents and soffits, contaminated insulation from droppings and urine, and structural damage to attics and chimneys. They may also create noise disturbances and carry parasites and diseases. Prompt removal minimizes damage and associated repair costs.
